feed.title: whimsysoul
feed.subtitle: OK Boomer, all the latest TikToks from whimsysoul

entry.title: Bay Area, you can't miss this!!! 😱 I just saw the Amy Sherald: American Sublime exhibition at SFMOMA (up now until March!) and it's just fantastic. You probably recognize @asherald Michelle Obama portrait, but now there's a chance to see 50 of her other
entry.content: Bay Area, you can't miss this!!! 😱 I just saw the Amy Sherald: American Sublime exhibition at SFMOMA (up now until March!) and it's just fantastic. You probably recognize @asherald Michelle Obama portrait, but now there's a chance to see 50 of her other

entry.title: #stitch with @Hayley ❤️‍🔥 im no Luigi but this is my favorite way to make evil companies hurt a little. Would be crazy if we all did this every day for like 10 mins 👀 #luigi #ceo #dietculture #dietculturerebel #dietculturedropout #marketing
entry.content: #stitch with @Hayley ❤️‍🔥 im no Luigi but this is my favorite way to make evil companies hurt a little. Would be crazy if we all did this every day for like 10 mins 👀 #luigi #ceo #dietculture #dietculturerebel #dietculturedropout #marketing

entry.title: Living in San Francisco right now feels like being inside jamanji - tornados, tsunamis, earthquakes. Just missing stampedes and swarms of bugs #sanfrancisco #tornado #midwestern #bayarea #onlyinsf
entry.content: Living in San Francisco right now feels like being inside jamanji - tornados, tsunamis, earthquakes. Just missing stampedes and swarms of bugs #sanfrancisco #tornado #midwestern #bayarea #onlyinsf

entry.title: 16th Century English Tudor hotel + bar hidden in the Bay Area 😱🇬🇧 Last Christmas Eve, Robin and I checked into the @pelicaninn and had one of my favorite Christmases to date. This inn is incredibly charming - just oozes old world charm and really makes y

entry.title: Have you heard the Golden Gate Bridge whistle yet? This humming whistling sound happens on a really windy days I think the sound is really beautiful. It's a very ethereal sounding but some people don't like it. What do you think? Have you heard the G
entry.content: Have you heard the Golden Gate Bridge whistle yet? This humming whistling sound happens on a really windy days I think the sound is really beautiful. It's a very ethereal sounding but some people don't like it. What do you think? Have you heard the G

entry.title: couldn't believe the price!!! Trader joes 🙏 out here helping me fuel my holiday parties without breaking the bank. Black girl magic is an awesome winery by the McBride sisters. They're black owned woman owned. They made great wines they're local to the B
entry.content: couldn't believe the price!!! Trader joes 🙏 out here helping me fuel my holiday parties without breaking the bank. Black girl magic is an awesome winery by the McBride sisters. They're black owned woman owned. They made great wines they're local to the B

entry.title: Why is it so cold today? This @Sézane sweater is so festive and cozy. i'm a size 14. I do have my whole office linked on LTK by the way. #curvy #sezane #holidayoutfit #sanfrancisco #bayarea #size14 #curvystyle

entry.title: totally though this was AI when I saw this online, but NOPE! There really is a giant IKEA bag in downtown San Francisco right now. Find it on Powell & Market 😂 #ikea #sanfrancisco #bayarea #whimsysoul #sanfranciscoworld #unionsquare #downtownsanfrancisco
entry.content: totally though this was AI when I saw this online, but NOPE! There really is a giant IKEA bag in downtown San Francisco right now. Find it on Powell & Market 😂 #ikea #sanfrancisco #bayarea #whimsysoul #sanfranciscoworld #unionsquare #downtownsanfrancisco

entry.title: Best place in SF to get live, fresh crab!!🦀 For winter solstice, Robin and I got up early and headed to Alioto Lazio Fish Co in Fisherman's Wharf to pick up a couple of fresh Dungeness crab! 🦀 Free parking out front 🦀 MUST pre-order online first (or, giv
entry.content: Best place in SF to get live, fresh crab!!🦀 For winter solstice, Robin and I got up early and headed to Alioto Lazio Fish Co in Fisherman's Wharf to pick up a couple of fresh Dungeness crab! 🦀 Free parking out front 🦀 MUST pre-order online first (or, giv

entry.title: Crab season! For winter solstice, Robin and I got up early and headed to Alioto Lazio Fish Co in Fisherman's Wharf to pick up a couple of fresh Dungeness crab! 🦀 Free parking out front 🦀 MUST pre-order online first (or, give them a call) 🦀 Alioto is a loc
entry.content: Crab season! For winter solstice, Robin and I got up early and headed to Alioto Lazio Fish Co in Fisherman's Wharf to pick up a couple of fresh Dungeness crab! 🦀 Free parking out front 🦀 MUST pre-order online first (or, give them a call) 🦀 Alioto is a loc

entry.title: have you spotted this unique Christmas tree in Golden Gate Park yet? Find it on the South side of Stowe Lake / Blue Heron Lake! #sanfrancisco #christmas #christmastree #bayarea #onlyinsf #sanfranciscolife #whimsysoul #goldengatepark

entry.title: IKEA is my happy place ✨❤️ That New Year itch to reorganize and finally tackle my Shelf Of Doom has finally hit, so Robin and I headed to the @IKEA in Downtown San Francisco to pick up some goodies. I actually haven't been in here before, so it was a fun

entry.title: San Francisco food hall you can't miss! Imagine hitting up happy hour here with the girls at Saluhall and then tipsy shopping at IKEA? Makes for a great lunch, too. I know this isn't brand new (about a year old) but it took me this long to stop by and no

entry.title: Ended 2024 with a bang ✨🎉 Started by heading to Ocean Beach here in San Francisco to catch the last sunset of 2024. Brought a bottle of Veuve Clicquot, some truffle popcorn and a cozy Sezane sweater + scarf (it got cold FAST once the sun set!!) Then bac

entry.title: Travel PSA! 🚨You now NEED a Visa to enter the UK! 🇬🇧 Starting Jan 2025, you need to have an approved UK ETA (electronic travel authorisation) which is basically just a visa, and a program to pre-screen travelers passing through the UK. You need this even
entry.content: Travel PSA! 🚨You now NEED a Visa to enter the UK! 🇬🇧 Starting Jan 2025, you need to have an approved UK ETA (electronic travel authorisation) which is basically just a visa, and a program to pre-screen travelers passing through the UK. You need this even

entry.title: Palm Springs Airport is insane like what do you mean I can snack on a cheesy quesadilla while sitting on actual grass under the shade of an actual palm tree all without leaving the airport??? 😱🌴✈️ California forever 🫶 If you haven't had a chance to fly th

entry.title: Ugly shelf makeover!! 😱 Our Shelf Of Doom finally broke me. We thrifted this red shelf almost 10 years ago from Facebook Marketplace when we were broke AF and just moved into this apartment. But it's always been a clutter zone. Living in a small space m

entry.title: I challenge YOU to donate $25 to LA fire victims!! If you have an extra $25, instead of sharing thoughts and prayers Story slides, I challenge you to donate $25 to someone displaced by these fires. I've learned from friends that have gone through CA wil
entry.content: I challenge YOU to donate $25 to LA fire victims!! If you have an extra $25, instead of sharing thoughts and prayers Story slides, I challenge you to donate $25 to someone displaced by these fires. I've learned from friends that have gone through CA wil

entry.title: $21k a night! 😱 this iconic hotel room in San Francisco can be found at the @fairmontsanfrancisco and is utterly beautiful. At 6,000 square feet with 3 bedrooms + baths, a 2-story library (with a secret passageway to the rooftop), a billiards room, sitti
entry.content: $21k a night! 😱 this iconic hotel room in San Francisco can be found at the @fairmontsanfrancisco and is utterly beautiful. At 6,000 square feet with 3 bedrooms + baths, a 2-story library (with a secret passageway to the rooftop), a billiards room, sitti
